cat > CLAUDE.md << 'EOF'
# Tear — Product Teardown Platform
## Project Context for Claude Code

**What this is:** An AI-powered product analysis platform. Users enter a product name, answer a structured Q&A, and receive a citation-backed research document + PowerPoint deck generated by a multi-agent pipeline.

**Tech stack:** Next.js 14 (App Router) · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · shadcn/ui · Vercel AI SDK v4 · Anthropic Claude API · Supabase (PostgreSQL) · Zustand · PptxGenJS · @react-pdf/renderer · Recharts · Framer Motion

**Design system:**
- Background: #FDFAF6 (warm off-white)
- Primary: #C2451E (terracotta red)
- Text: #1C1412 (near-black)
- Muted: #7C6E68
- Border: #E8DDD2
- Fonts: Lora (serif, headings) + DM Sans (body)

**Agent architecture:**
- Orchestrator Agent: coordinates the pipeline, no direct tool access
- Question Agent: validates product, generates Tier 2 questions
- Crawler Agent: web search via Anthropic web search tool
- Backend Agent: chunks + deduplicates + indexes to Supabase
- Document Agent: synthesizes 8-section research doc
- PPTX Agent: generates slide deck via PptxGenJS
- Helper Chat Agent: always-on companion with session context

**SSE streaming:** All agent progress streams via Server-Sent Events. Use Vercel AI SDK's streamText + useChat.

**Database tables:** sessions · teardown_research · teardown_qa · teardown_pptx · agent_logs

**Team:**
- Ashutosh: Lead dev. Owns backend agents, API routes, Supabase schema, GitHub, Vercel deploy.
- Ashish: Architecture & UX. Reviews all designs, writes project context docs, tests teardown quality.
- Nishanth: QA & Content. End-to-end flow testing, PPTX validation, prompt engineering for Document Agent.

**Phase 1 scope:** Landing → Q&A (Tier 1 + Tier 2) → Live Agent Feed (SSE) → Research Doc → PPTX → Helper Chat. No auth. Session-based via localStorage UUID.

**Do not:** Add auth in Phase 1. Do not use third-party crawler APIs — use Anthropic's built-in web search tool only.
EOF
